arts.ttl: Diego Simeone and Rodrigo de Paul discuss Atlético Madrid’s “great opportunity” against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid put forward coach Diego Simeone and midfielder Rodrigo de Paul to speak to the media ahead of the UEFA Champions League last 16 first leg against Real Madrid, with journalists asking the duo about the pressure of such a high-stakes derby. Simeone on whether Real Madrid are a different beast in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Real Madrid set to become first team to join the ‘500 club’
arts.sum: The game will mark Real Madrid’s 500th match in the European Cup as Carlo Ancelotti’s men remain in the hunt to add to their record fifteen victories. Trailing Madrid in the all-time European Cup/Champions League ranking are Bayern Munich with 404 matches, followed by Barcelona (357), Juventus (311) and Benfica (302).

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Atletico lineups: Confirmed team news, predicted XIs and injury latest for Champions League
arts.sum: Both managers are expected to make changes after conflicting results at the weekend

arts.ttl: Real Madrid boss Ancelotti provides Federico Valverde injury update ahead of
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Monday provided an update on the wellbeing of midfield star Federico Valverde. Valverde, for his part, has not featured in any of…

arts.ttl: Bellingham 2.0! Real Madrid plot SHOCK transfer for England star
arts.sum: According to the Daily Mail, Real Madrid scouts have made regular checks on Wharton since his return from injury. Real Madrid are keeping a close eye on the development of Adam Wharton, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's 'bad game,' Amorim is least of Man United issues, more
arts.sum: In Italy, Napoli and Inter Milan shared the spoils in a top-of-the-table clash that will leave one set of fans feeling happier than the other, and there were talking points galore around Borussia Dortmund, Bayer Leverkusen, Paris Saint-Germain, and much more. Maybe it was his dental work, but Mbappé turned in arguably his worst game since joining the club (somehow ending up with zero shots) and Vinicius Jr. wasn't far behind; David Alaba struggled at the back, Rudiger gave away a penalty to Jesús Rodriguez and Luka Modric looked his age.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti to Managing Madrid: “We will not change our approach against Atletico Madrid”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media ahead of the UEFA Champions League tie against Atlético Madrid, addressing a number of pre-match topics. Ancelotti to Managing Madrid’s Kiyan Sobhani about the difference in approach against Atletico (compared to Manchester City)

arts.ttl: Real Madrid send scouts to watch Crystal Palace star
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Real Madrid recently sent scouts to watch the performance of a member of the midfield ranks at Premier League outfit Crystal Palace. That’s according…

arts.ttl: Capello: “Mbappé needed three months to find out what Madrid is about”
arts.sum: He believes Madrid’s experience in high-stakes games gives them an edge, but he also acknowledged Diego Simeone’s exceptional ability to prepare his team for such encounters. Regarding Madrid’s emerging young players, such as Raúl Asencio, Capello expressed confidence in their quality, noting that their presence in the team is a testament to their talent, though patience is needed for their development.

arts.ttl: Vinícius Júnior: “I have a contract with Real Madrid until 2027 and I hope I can renew it as soon as possible”
arts.sum: Vinícius Júnior on 300 games with Real Madrid Ahead of the UEFA Champions League tie against Atlético Madrid, Real Madrid star Vinícius Júnior spoke to the media at the press conference.
